---
title: Next.js + Bento
description: The flagship Slik template. Dark editorial grid layout with Supabase.
---

# Next.js + Bento

The flagship Slik template. Dark, editorial, Bento Grid layout.

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Framework | Next.js 15 (App Router) |
| Language | TypeScript |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL) |
| Auth | Supabase Auth |
| Fonts | DM Serif Display, DM Mono, Geist |

## Pages Included

| Route | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `/` | Landing page with Bento grid |
| `/login` | Email + Google OAuth login |
| `/signup` | Registration with password strength |
| `/reset-password` | Two-state password reset |
| `/dashboard` | User dashboard (protected) |
| `/dashboard/settings` | Profile + security settings |
| `/admin` | Admin panel (admin role required) |

## Design Tokens

```css
--bg: #0a0a0a
--surface: #111111
--accent: #c8f135
--purple: #9b7ff4
--teal: #3ecfb2
```

## Quick Start

```bash
npx create-slik@latest
# Choose: Next.js → Bento
```

Then follow the [Supabase Setup guide](/guides/supabase-setup).
